headline: Why STAAR Surgical (STAA) Stock Is Trading Up Today
summary: Shares of medical lens company STAAR Surgical (NASDAQ:STAA) jumped 3.7% in the afternoon session after investors reacted to positive news in the broader ophthalmology sector as Cencora agreed to acquire EyeSouth Partners' retina business for $1.1 billion.
